title: Onboarding Design in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger onboarding design in practice judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Onboarding Design in Practice is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Onboarding Design in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good onboarding design in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Onboarding Design in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
